$comment: Cross-implementation interop vector for txArmGrant.clientSig (e2e-auth.v1). cqdx/pancetta(Rust)/panino(TS) MUST reproduce canonicalBytesHex byte-for-byte and verify clientSig over it. Generated by cqdx Step 4a.
canonicalization: UTF-8 of JSON.stringify over every present field EXCEPT clientSig, object keys sorted ascending by UTF-16 code unit (== ASCII lexicographic; matches Rust BTreeMap<String> UTF-8 byte order for ASCII keys), no whitespace, integers as plain JSON numbers, absent optional fields omitted.

conformance.pancetta: PASS - Rust serde_json over BTreeMap<String,Value> reproduces canonicalBytesHex byte-for-byte (sorted keys, no whitespace, plain integer numbers), and ed25519-dalek 2.x verify + verify_strict accept clientSig over those bytes with clientPublicKeyRaw. Verified 2026-07-01; lands as a drift-guarded conformance test in pancetta-agent during P3 capability-verification build.
